name: tflw
description: testFlow CLI — an external DSL (.tflw files) for API testing: config as tflw itself, sessions, capture-chaining, hooks/retry/tags, actions+JS escape hatch, teaching-quality diagnostics, and a self-contained report.html + junit.xml. v0.1 is API-only (M0-M2.6); the browser half lands in 0.2.0.
author: Deepak Tuteja <tuteja123@gmail.com>

scripts.prepack: npm run build --prefix ../.. -w @tflw/lang -w @tflw/runtime -w @tflw/reporter -w @tflw/lsp-server && npm run build
